examples: Zestful personality charms all who meet him!
Seeing his family after three months away was a zestful moment.
Many see the rich world as old, debt-ridden and out of ideascompared with the young, zestful and high-saving emerging markets.
Robin Hoods have come and gone, at least one of them wondrously zestful (Errol Flynn's) and one of them woefully zonked (Kevin Costner's).
